description_long: This is a tall, modern street light featuring a single, slender pole with a long, gently curved horizontal arm extending outward. The lamp head is streamlined and elongated, resembling a teardrop or aerodynamic capsule, and is mounted at the end of the arm. Supporting cables or rods connect the lamp head and arm to the pole, providing structural stability and a minimalist aesthetic. The pole itself is plain and cylindrical, with a simple square base for ground anchoring. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative embellishments, making it suitable for urban streets, highways, or parking lots. The materials appear to be primarily metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a matte or slightly glossy finish.
description: A tall, modern street light with a plain cylindrical pole and a single, curved arm supporting a streamlined lamp head. The design is minimalist and functional, with visible support rods and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved arm and the streamlined lamp head extending to the left.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pole head-on, with the arm and support rods forming a triangular shape above the pole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the arm and lamp head extending to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the lamp head and the converging support rods, with the pole centered.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, elongated capsule shape with a smooth surface and integrated diffuser, no decorative elements.
